- Initializing project context.
- 2026-03-05 [PSZ Main Web/Phase 1]: Initialized Next.js foundation in `psz_main_web` with Tailwind setup, two-font typography, responsive global Navbar/Footer, and external Commonwealth bridge link wiring via env-configurable URL. (COPILOT_LOG)

- 2026-03-05 [PSZ Main Web/Phase 3]: Implemented modular homepage assembly in `src/app/page.tsx` with Hero, mission overview, programs preview, framer-motion impact counters, join CTA, and news preview; wired all data through Phase 2 service layer. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-05 [PSZ Main Web/Phase 4]: Added Programs and News hubs with category filters/search, dynamic `[slug]` detail pages with metadata generation, related content/share affordances, and service-layer slug fetch helpers. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-05 [PSZ Main Web/Phase 5]: Completed SEO and semantic polish with strict metadata for layout/static pages, improved dynamic metadata consistency, semantic heading refinements in hub components, and verified optimized Next `Image` usage with descriptive alt text. (COPILOT_LOG)

(COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-07 [PSZ Main Web/Performance]: Major performance & clean-code pass â€” (1) Created `LazyVideo` component (`src/components/ui/LazyVideo.tsx`) with IntersectionObserver-based lazy loading and auto-pause for off-screen videos; (2) Replaced all non-hero `<video>` elements with `LazyVideo` to defer ~103 MB of video downloads; (3) Switched all `<img>` tags to `next/image` with AVIF/WebP format support, quality caps, and proper `sizes` hints for approach grid, showcase, impact hero, heart members (~54 MB of PNGs), program placeholders, and testimonial avatars; (4) Removed redundant Google Fonts CSS `@import` (already loaded via `next/font/google`); (5) Removed artificial 500 ms delays from all three service functions (`getArticles`, `getPrograms`, `getImpactStats`); (6) Updated `next.config.ts` with image optimization config (AVIF/WebP, remote patterns for Pexels/Unsplash, 30-day cache TTL), compression, and static asset cache headers; (7) Downscaled external Pexels video URLs from UHD 2560Ă—1440 to 720p; (8) Added CSS `contain: layout style paint` on `[data-scroll-section]` and `content-visibility: auto` on `.dark-bottom` for rendering performance; (9) Extracted inline data arrays (HEART_MEMBERS, SCROLL_TEXT_BLOCKS, PROGRAM_CARDS, TESTIMONIAL_AVATARS) from 1353-line `HomeClient.tsx` into `home.content.ts` reducing component to ~1220 lines; (10) Fixed `info.mp4` â†’ `Info.mp4` filename casing bug that would 404 on Linux/Vercel. Build passes cleanly with zero errors or warnings. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-07 [Commonwealth Lab/Marketplace UI]: Implemented complete Commonwealth Lab Marketplace UI with dummy data for presentation â€” (1) Created `Product` model (`src/lib/models/Product.ts`) with `Product` interface, `CartItem` interface, `ProductCategory` type, and `PRODUCT_CATEGORIES` array; (2) Added 16 dummy products across 4 categories (Traditional Clothing, Handicrafts, Cultural Goods, PSZ Merchandise) in `src/data/products.ts` with Unsplash placeholder images; (3) Built product service layer (`src/lib/services/getProducts.ts`) with `getProducts`, `getProductBySlug`, `getFeaturedProducts`; (4) Created `CartContext` (`src/features/commonwealth-lab/context/CartContext.tsx`) with React Context API for client-side cart state (add/remove/update/clear, computed totals); (5) Built 9 reusable components: `ProductCard`, `ProductGrid`, `ProductGallery`, `CategoryFilter`, `QuantitySelector`, `CartItem`, `CartSummary`, `MarketplaceHero`, `ProductDetailClient`; (6) Implemented 5 page routes under `/commonwealth-lab/`: landing page (hero, featured products, category grid, CTA), product listing (search, category filter, sort, pagination with Suspense boundary), product detail with `generateStaticParams`/`generateMetadata`, cart page, checkout page with form and payment selector; (7) Integrated "Commonwealth Lab" nav link into `site.ts` and updated `Navbar.tsx` slice range; (8) Luxury/premium design with gold (#C4A265) accents, elegant typography, hover animations, and responsive layouts; (9) All product images use `next/image` with proper sizing; (10) Also resolved merge conflict markers across 9 files from prior rebase (home.content.ts, HomeClient.tsx, getArticles.ts, getPrograms.ts, getImpactStats.ts, next.config.ts, globals.css, context.instructions.md, package-lock.json). Build passes cleanly with 36 static pages generated. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-07 [PSZ Main Web/Media Optimization]: Comprehensive image and video performance optimization â€” (1) Created `scripts/optimize-images.mjs` using sharp to batch-compress all 23 local PNG/JPEG images to WebP at multiple responsive sizes (sm 480px, md 960px, lg 1440px, xl 1920px, full), achieving 94.3% reduction (82.46 MB â†’ 4.66 MB); output at `public/images/optimized/` with manifest.json containing paths and blur placeholder base64 data URIs; (2) Created `scripts/generate-video-posters.mjs` to generate dark-gradient WebP poster placeholders for all 4 local MP4 videos, output at `public/videos/posters/`; (3) Enhanced `LazyVideo` component with `poster` prop for instant visual before video loads, `webmSrc` prop for dual MP4+WebM source support, and state-based `<source>` element injection so video data is never downloaded until IntersectionObserver triggers; (4) Created `src/lib/utils/media-helpers.ts` with `getBlurDataURL()`, `getOptimizedImagePath()`, `getOptimizedSizes()`, and `VIDEO_POSTERS` exports for centralized media optimization access; (5) Added `placeholder="blur"` + `blurDataURL` to all member images (Ă—8), approach grid images (Ă—7), founder image, and showcase image in HomeClient.tsx â€” eliminates CLS and shows instant low-quality preview; (6) Added `poster` attribute to hero `<video>` and all 4 `LazyVideo` instances so users see a frame immediately instead of blank space; (7) Switched footer CSS `background-image` from 18.17 MB `footer.png` to 0.14 MB `footer.webp` (99.2% savings); (8) Extended `next.config.ts` headers with security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy), font caching, video poster caching, and Accept-based Vary header for optimized images; (9) Updated `vercel.json` with CDN caching rules for `/images/optimized/`, `/videos/`, `/videos/posters/`, and `/_next/static/`; (10) Added npm scripts: `optimize:images`, `optimize:posters`, `optimize:all`, and wired `prebuild` to auto-run optimization before `next build`. Build passes cleanly â€” 36 static pages, zero errors/warnings. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-07 [PSZ Main Web/Mobile Responsiveness]: Comprehensive mobile responsiveness fixes across entire site â€” (1) Fixed horizontal overflow by changing all `100vw` sections to `width: 100%; max-width: 100%` with `overflow-x: hidden` on mobile, expanded covered sections to include split, highlight, overlay-reveal, final-cta, scroll-text-block, impact-text/image; (2) Marketplace 2-column mobile grid: changed `ProductGrid.tsx` from `grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2` to `grid-cols-2` with tighter gap (`gap-x-3 gap-y-6`), updated Commonwealth Lab landing page featured products and category grids to also use `grid-cols-2` at all sizes; (3) Made `ProductCard` compact on mobile with smaller text (`text-xs`), reduced padding (`px-2 pt-3 pb-4`), shorter aspect ratio (`aspect-[3/4]` vs `aspect-[4/5]`), and correct `sizes="50vw"` hint for 2-col layout; (4) Fixed hero text positioning: shifted `.hero-content` up via `top: 45%` at 768px, `top: 42%` at 480px, `top: 40%` at 375px to prevent text appearing too low on mobile; (5) Reduced stack-card (programs section) sizing on mobile: `min-height: 38rem` â†’ `34rem` â†’ `30rem` across 768px/480px/375px breakpoints, illustration panel height `11rem` â†’ `9rem` â†’ `8rem`, content padding tightened, added smaller font sizes for card description/subtitle; (6) Fixed navbar mobile padding from `6rem 5% 3rem` â†’ `2.4rem 5% 1.6rem` to prevent excessive top space; (7) Fixed `MarketplaceHero` from `w-screen` to `w-full` preventing horizontal overflow; (8) Added mobile-appropriate padding to Commonwealth Lab sections (`py-16 sm:py-28`, `px-4 sm:px-6`); (9) Added `padding-inline: 5%` to pinned-video section text on mobile for edge safety. Build passes cleanly â€” 36 static pages, zero errors. (COPILOT_LOG)
